subject: Verify train/val/test split dates and forward-chaining
description: Read Step 5 (Apply Split) script for CSD. Verify: (a) Train end = (2024, 10), Val end = (2025, 4). (b) No look-ahead bias (test data is temporal future). (c) Forward-chaining enforced (no random shuffling). (d) Check if split dates are hardcoded (CSD-only) or parameterized (all categories). Output: split_verification.md
